title: mentha aquatica var. hungarica
intro: Mentha aquatica var. hungarica, also known as Hungarian water mint, is a variant of the water mint plant species. It is a perennial herb with fragrant leaves, traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. hungarica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and calming respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its essential oil is also extracted for aromatherapy purposes.
